game_description: Build a unicorn army of 7 to win while sabotaging your rivals.

strategies.strategy_detailed: Keep Neigh cards and Magic cards that destroy or steal. Discard pure unicorn cards with no effects — Baby Unicorn is your free starting piece anyway. An opening hand with 2 Neighs lets you block two key plays and is worth keeping even without unicorns.
strategy_stealth: Keep Neighs and destructive Magic
Discard plain unicorn cards
2 Neighs opening = strong hand

strategies.strategy_detailed: Know your deck's win path: combo-heavy builds (Narwhals, Unicorn Lasso chains) need protection cards; pure speed builds need cheap unicorns and skip-sabotage cards. Don't mix strategies — a half-combo half-speed hand does neither well.
strategy_stealth: Pick combo OR speed — don't mix
Combo builds need protection cards
Speed builds need cheap unicorns

strategies.condition: When to play a Neigh card
strategies.strategy_detailed: Save Neighs for Unicorn Lasso, targeted destroy spells, and Unicorn Poison — not for basic unicorn plays. A Neigh used to stop a basic unicorn play is a 1-for-1 exchange at best. Used against Lasso or destroy, it prevents a 2-for-1 swing against you.
strategy_stealth: Neigh: save for Lasso and Destroy
Don't Neigh basic unicorn plays
Prevent 2-for-1 swings against you

strategies.strategy_detailed: In multi-player games, target the player closest to 7 unicorns, not the weakest. Pile-on effects that punish the leader keep the game competitive. Targeting a player who's already behind just accelerates their elimination and concentrates power elsewhere.
strategy_stealth: Target the leader, not the weakest
Pile-on keeps game balanced
Weak players alive = leader targeted more

strategies.strategy_detailed: When you're ahead, play at least one protection upgrade (Rainbow Mane, Glitter Bomb trigger, Barbed Wire) before the table turns against you. Leading by 2+ unicorns will attract every Lasso and destroy card at the table next turn.
strategy_stealth: Play protection before table targets you
2+ ahead = everyone's target
Barbed Wire punishes attackers

strategies.strategy_detailed: An upgrade that doubles your unicorn production (Unicorn Shrimpandium, Rainbow Mane) is often worth more than adding one unicorn manually. Each subsequent turn it generates value. Play upgrades early; they compound. Save direct unicorns for your final push to 7.
strategy_stealth: Upgrades compound over turns
Play upgrades early — they stack
Direct unicorns for final push to 7

strategies.strategy_detailed: Downgrades that prevent drawing cards (Pandamonium) or block playing cards (Slowdown) are stronger than downgrades that just remove unicorns. Removal can be Neigh'd; a 1-turn Slowdown blocks a full turn of plays without a Neigh escape.
strategy_stealth: Draw/play blockers > removal downgrades
Removal gets Neigh'd; Slowdown doesn't
Slowdown locks one full turn of plays

strategies.condition: Opponent playing a Neigh on you
strategies.strategy_detailed: If you have a Super Neigh (Neigh everything including Neighs), save it for your win attempt play, not for mid-game protection. Super Neigh is your insurance card for the final unicorn that wins the game — an opponent Neigh on that play loses you the game.
strategy_stealth: Super Neigh: save for win attempt
Don't use it mid-game on protection
Opponent Neigh on win play = game loss

strategies.strategy_detailed: Before playing your 7th unicorn, clear defenses: play any card that discards opponent's hand or forces discards first if possible. Then play your 7th with Super Neigh in hand if available. If no protection, play fast on the turn after an opponent burned their last Neigh.
strategy_stealth: Clear defenses, then play your 7th
Play after their last Neigh is spent
Super Neigh in hand = safe win attempt

strategies.strategy_detailed: When an opponent is at 6 unicorns, hold your Neigh specifically for their 7th. Don't burn it the turn before on a downgrade or steal attempt. If you lack a Neigh, coordinate with other players to ensure someone has one — the whole table loses if they succeed.
strategy_stealth: Hold Neigh for their 7th unicorn only
Don't burn it the turn before
Get the table to block their win
